title: Iskender Kebab with Nutella Chocolate Dipping Sauce
description: A rich and indulgent twist on traditional Turkish kebabs, served with a decadent Nutella dipping sauce.

ingredients.name: Iskender kebab meat
ingredients.notes: or substitute with other kebab meat

instructions: 2. Slice the Turkish bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until crispy.
3. In a separate pan, melt the Nutella over low heat until smooth.
4. Stir in the gooey chocolate sauce until well combined.
5. Serve the toasted bread with the Nutella-chocolate sauce for dipping.
6. If using kebab meat, cook according to package instructions or grill until cooked through.
7. Slice the kebab meat into thin strips and serve alongside the bread with dipping sauce.
